chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 1562 of 2025 Applicant: Ali Bux s/o Natho Mallah (on bail) through Mr. Sajjad Shah Sheerazi, Advocate. Complainant: Asfar Alam s/o Khan Muhammad. Nemo. Injured Imtiaz Ali s/o Ali Ahmed (in person). The State: through Mr. Shahid Shaikh, Additional P.G Date of hearing: 27.04.2026 Date of Order: 27.04.2026 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA J:- Through instant Bail Application, applicant named above seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.133 of 2025 registered under Sections 324, 506, 114, 337-A(i), 337-F(i), 504, 35 PPC at Police Station Talhar, after his bail plea was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge-I, Badin vide order dated 23.10.2025. 2. The details and particulars of the F.I.R. are already available in the bail application and F.I.R., same could be gathered from the copy of F.I.R. attached with such application, hence need not to reproduce the same hereunder. 3. At the outset, it appears from the order sheet dated 28.01.2026 that complainant Afsar Alam was served but he has gone to Balochistan hence no further notice to the complainant was ordered to be required. However, the injured namely Imtiaz Ali is present in Court today and has filed his Affidavit of No Objection, stating therein that they have resolved their dispute with the applicant/accused due to intervention of Nekmards and that he has No Objection if the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant/accused is confirmed. 4. On the other hand, learned A.P.G in the light of No Objection extended by injured has also recorded his No Objection. 5.

However, the injured namely Imtiaz Ali is present in Court today and has filed his Affidavit of No Objection, stating therein that they have resolved their dispute with the applicant/accused due to intervention of Nekmards and that he has No Objection if the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant/accused is confirmed. 4. On the other hand, learned A.P.G in the light of No Objection extended by injured has also recorded his No Objection. 5. Heard learned counsel for the parties and A.P.G. The offence with which the applicant is charged is compoundable. Per counsel for applicant and A.P.G in order to bury their hatchets and due to intervention of their Nekmards, the injured has submitted his No Objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest Page 2 of 2 bail granted to the applicant. Accordingly, the interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 18.12.2025 is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. The applicant / accused is however directed to attend the trial. In case of his failure, the trial Court would be at liberty to take action in accordance with law. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Tufail
